assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and an eligible work email address.
The developer does not already have a PagerDuty account.
No PagerDuty subdomain, service, or integration exists yet.

developer_goal: Create a PagerDuty trial account and finish the official trial onboarding flow into the account.

first_success.outcome: Trial onboarding completes and the developer is directed into the new PagerDuty account with the first service available.
first_success.observable_signal: After the final Connect With Your Chat Tools step is completed or skipped, the guide states the developer is directed to the PagerDuty account.

route_selection.surface: PagerDuty trial signup and Trial Account Onboarding
route_selection.rule: Use the documented new-account onboarding surface; skip optional onboarding sections when the guide provides Skip step.
route_selection.selected: Trial Account Onboarding with optional integrations, schedule, and chat steps skipped where documented

candidates.name: Trial Account Onboarding (skip optional steps)
candidates.reason: Official Getting Started guide for brand-new trial accounts from work-email signup through redirect into the account.

candidates.name: Services and Integrations after an existing account
candidates.reason: Assumes an existing account, role, and notification model.

candidates.name: REST API access keys or Events API v2
candidates.reason: Developer API routes require an existing account and usually a service integration key created after onboarding.

required_path.action: On the PagerDuty signup page, enter a work email and choose Get Started.

required_fields.label: Work Email
required_fields.notes: Consumer domains such as gmail.com are rejected.

required_path.observable_result: PagerDuty advances to the profile details step.

required_path.action: Enter First Name, Last Name, Company, and Country, then continue.

required_fields.label: Password
required_fields.notes: Exact password composition rules are not published on the onboarding guide.

required_path.observable_result: PagerDuty advances to subdomain and region setup.

required_path.action: Choose a unique subdomain, select USA or EU service region, accept Terms and Privacy Policy, and create the account.

required_fields.label: Subdomain
required_fields.notes: At least five characters and not already in use; signup page also documents 5-40 character rules.

required_fields.label: Terms of Service and Privacy Policy acknowledgement

required_path.observable_result: The trial account is created and trial onboarding begins.

required_path.action: Enter a Service Name for the first service and continue.

required_path.observable_result: Onboarding advances without adding an integration.
Onboarding advances without testing notification channels.

required_path.action: Complete the Download the Mobile App onboarding step.

required_fields.label: Mobile app download or continue control
required_fields.notes: Guide documents Download and Next but, unlike neighboring steps, does not document a Skip control.

required_path.observable_result: Onboarding advances to the schedule step.
Onboarding advances without inviting schedule users.

required_path.action: Skip Connect With Your Chat Tools and finish onboarding.
required_path.observable_result: PagerDuty directs the developer into the account.

prerequisites.description: An eligible work email address; common consumer email domains are rejected.

external_gates.description: Work-email eligibility gate on trial signup.
Possible mobile-app install requirement if the onboarding step cannot be skipped.

platform_outcomes.description: Create Account provisions the trial tenant on the chosen region and subdomain.
Completing or skipping the final chat-tools step redirects into the PagerDuty account.

excluded.item: Configuring and testing notification methods during onboarding
Creating an on-call schedule and inviting users during onboarding
Connecting Slack or Microsoft Teams during onboarding

excluded.reason: Downstream developer route after an account exists.

sources.title: Trial Account Onboarding
evidence_supported: Skip controls for integrations, notifications, schedule, and chat

sources.title: API Access Keys
evidence_supported: REST API key generation assumes existing account and admin permissions

uncertainties.question: Can the current trial onboarding mobile-app step be skipped without installing the iOS or Android app?
uncertainties.impact: If download is mandatory, the shortest path gains an external-store handoff and possibly a blocked route for developers without a mobile device.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated fresh-trial walkthrough showing whether Skip exists or whether Next works without installing the app.

uncertainties.question: What password composition rules does the live signup form enforce?
uncertainties.impact: Rejected passwords can add correction loops before subdomain selection.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Capture of the current password validation messaging on https://www.pagerduty.com/sign-up/.
